main.description: Manually trigger a pipeline run on a Tangled spindle. Intended to be called via PDS service proxying (the 'atproto-proxy' header, pointed at the spindle's did:web service entry), so the user's PDS mints and signs the inter-service auth token; the spindle verifies the token's issuer against their DID document and requires it to match the trigger's 'actor'. Mirrors the sh.tangled.pipeline fields a knot dispatches on a push/PR event.

knot.description: Knot hostname that hosts the repo, e.g. knot1.tangled.sh.

pipelineRkey.description: Record key identifying this pipeline run; only needs to be unique per run.

actor.description: DID of the actor the run is attributed to. Must equal the issuer of the service-auth token.

repoDid.description: DID of the repo (the owner DID used for sh.tangled.repo.blob lookups).

ref.description: Commit SHA to run at. The spindle fetches .github/workflows/*.yml at this exact commit, so it must be a real commit, not a branch name.

inputs.description: Optional workflow_dispatch-style inputs, as a map of string keys to string values.

submitted.description: True once the trigger was accepted and workflow submission started.

workflows.description: The workflow stems that were submitted, with their log/status stream URLs.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Malformed body or missing required fields.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Missing or invalid inter-service auth token.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Token issuer does not match actor, or repo is not authorized for this spindle.

logsUrl.description: URL to the log stream for this workflow run.

statusUrl.description: URL to the status stream for this workflow run.
